tasks.label: Deploy (development)
args: fisher remove MrBasa/TideReport@v1 2>/dev/null; fisher remove "${workspaceFolder}" 2>/dev/null; fisher install "${workspaceFolder}"

tasks.label: Test
args: fishtape test/unit/*.fish test/unit/*/*.fish test/integration/*.fish test/integration/*/*.fish; and fishtape test/network/*.fish; set -l code $status; echo ""; if test $code -eq 0; echo "--- Testing completed: all passed ---"; else; echo "--- Testing completed: FAILED (exit code $code) ---"; end; exit $code
